scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w apps/api && npm run type-check -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm test -w apps/api && npm test -w apps/web
scripts.verify: npm install --no-audit --no-fund --include=dev --loglevel=error && npm run type-check && npm test && node scripts/smoke.mjs
